notes: Verified hotbar is 6 slots (COLUMNS=6), not five; slot 0 is weapons/tools only.
Verified eat is a timed channel (1 to 10s by food); cancel on walk/jump/roll/damage; double-click desktop / double-tap mobile within 500ms.
Hunger: walk x1.15 / sprint x2 drain; regen blocked at or below 30%; Hungry (at or below 20%) no sprint; Starving (below 5%) slower + no jump; at 0% HP ticks every 2s.
Disease: silent incubation then badge under health; food restore x0.5 while symptomatic; deer/cow cooked still tiny prion residual; well-fed buff is a separate cooked roll.
Study: corpse ~60s; Study channel 3 to 10s; awards 1 to 3 points; Bestiary mastery at 100 (unified codex ladder, not legacy 200).
Meal theft: contested pickup 2 to 10s + hard aggro until death.
Minimap colors confirmed: you yellow (#f4d35e), others blue (#3b82f6), owned plots orange.
Status stack (top-right) covers bleed/poison/heat/cold/lava/frostbite/shields; buff badges (under HP) gold buff / red debuff / disease-colored (lime common, purple prions, others by disease).
No new sections: frostbite/fire/fishing stay in Mechanics Guide; campfire cook kept under cook-wild-meat.
preferKeepSectionIds: kept all eight; no reorder.

sections.title: Stay Alive
sections.description: Your health bar sits above your avatar. Avoid wildlife hits, lava, and cold damage. Health only regenerates when hunger is above 30%. Watch floating damage numbers and the top-right status icons when something is ticking you down.

sections.title: Manage Hunger
sections.description: Hunger drains over time, faster while walking (x1.15) and much faster while sprinting (x2). Double-click food in your hotbar to eat (a short hold, about 1 to 10 seconds by food). Walk, jump, roll, or take a hit to cancel mid-bite with no consume. Below 20% you cannot sprint; below 5% you also cannot jump and move slower. At 0% hunger you take damage every 2 seconds until you eat.

sections.title: Cook Wild Meat
sections.description: Raw wildlife meat can infect you. Infection incubates silently for in-game hours or days (no badge yet), then symptoms appear: nausea, poison, confusion, sleep, or locked sprint, jump, or roll. While sick, food restores only half hunger. Light a campfire, keep raw meat in inventory, stay within 2 tiles, and use Cook (about 2 to 12 seconds by animal). Cooked meat is usually safe and may roll a short well-fed buff. Deer and cow cooked cuts still have a small prion residual risk.

sections.title: Study Wildlife
sections.description: After a kill, the body stays about 60 seconds. Click the corpse and press Study. Larger animals take longer (3 to 10 seconds) and grant 1 to 3 study points. Open Codex, then Bestiary, to track each species toward 100. Higher study unlocks deeper dossier lines and clearer meat item details.

sections.title: Mini Map
sections.description: The map in the top-left shows nearby terrain, biome, and coordinates. You are the yellow dot, other players are blue, and your claimed land is highlighted in orange.

sections.title: Inventory
sections.description: Your six-slot hotbar sits at the bottom center. The far-left slot is weapons and tools only (empty shows a fist). Click a slot for item actions, drag to rearrange, and drag items out to drop them. Walk over ground loot to pick it up. Snatching a stack while an animal is still eating it takes 2 to 10 seconds and makes that animal fight you until one of you dies.

sections.title: Status Effects
sections.description: Icons on the top-right track active conditions: bleed, poison, heat, cold, lava burn, frostbite stacks, shields, and similar DoTs. Numbers show remaining damage, stacks, or time left. Click a row when you need the summary line.

sections.title: Buff Badges
sections.description: Small icons below your health bar show combat buffs, debuffs, and diseases. Gold borders are buffs; red borders are debuffs; disease badges use their own colors (often lime, purple for prions). Click a badge for details and countdown. Disease badges only appear after incubation ends.
